# TM 11240A-OR/B — MTVR MK23
## Section 5.9 — Cooling System

**Component:** engine coolant thermostat housing
**Echelon:** Sustainment (5th echelon depot)
**Discrepancy class:** Class III (corrective action required)
**Primary part NSN:** `2930-01-209-6763`
**Associated seal kit NSN:** `5330-01-866-8621`
**Gasket NSN:** `5330-01-267-7860`
**Torque spec:** **28 ft-lb (38.0 N-m)**
**Lubricant / fluid:** MIL-A-46153 ELC coolant
**PMCS interval:** Q

### Failure indication
Weep at gasket from over-torque.

### Procedure
1. Park on level ground; set parking brake; chock wheels per OPER manual.
2. Disconnect NATO slave cable; lock-out / tag-out.
3. Reference Figure 5-9. Coolant thermostat housing torque sequence (1-3-2-4 cross pattern). for orientation.
4. Remove engine coolant thermostat housing; inspect bore, mating face, and adjacent harness for collateral damage.
5. Install replacement P/N `2930-01-209-6763`. Replace gasket `5330-01-267-7860` — single-use item.
6. Torque to spec (**28 ft-lb (38.0 N-m)**). Final torque after a 5-minute settle.
7. Refill / top off with MIL-A-46153 ELC coolant. Bleed / purge per the section's bleed procedure.
8. Operational check: 10 minutes idle + road test per PMCS Table 2-1 sequence 14a.

### Verification
- No visible leak at 1.5x operating pressure for 60 seconds.
- Connector resistance < 0.1 ohm to chassis ground (where applicable).
- Record PM action in GCSS-MC EM record under PMCS interval **Q**.

> _alt-text figure description_: Figure 5-9. Coolant thermostat housing torque sequence (1-3-2-4 cross pattern).

## Section 9.3 — Drive Train (Geared Hubs)

**Component:** geared hub output seal
**Echelon:** Field Maintainer (3rd echelon)
**Discrepancy class:** Class I (no action)
**Primary part NSN:** `2520-01-560-9942`
**Associated seal kit NSN:** `5330-01-200-2918`
**Gasket NSN:** `5330-01-145-4541`
**Torque spec:** **70 ft-lb (94.9 N-m)**
**Lubricant / fluid:** MIL-PRF-2105E 80W-90 GO
**PMCS interval:** S

### Failure indication
Class iii leak at hub face — gear oil contaminating brake.

### Procedure
1. Park on level ground; set parking brake; chock wheels per OPER manual.
2. Disconnect NATO slave cable; lock-out / tag-out.
3. Reference Figure 9-3. HMMWV geared hub cross-section. for orientation.
4. Remove geared hub output seal; inspect bore, mating face, and adjacent harness for collateral damage.
5. Install replacement P/N `2520-01-560-9942`. Replace gasket `5330-01-145-4541` — single-use item.
6. Torque to spec (**70 ft-lb (94.9 N-m)**). Final torque after a 5-minute settle.
7. Refill / top off with MIL-PRF-2105E 80W-90 GO. Bleed / purge per the section's bleed procedure.
8. Operational check: 10 minutes idle + road test per PMCS Table 2-1 sequence 14a.

### Verification
- No visible leak at 1.5x operating pressure for 60 seconds.
- Connector resistance < 0.1 ohm to chassis ground (where applicable).
- Record PM action in GCSS-MC EM record under PMCS interval **S**.

> _alt-text figure description_: Figure 9-3. HMMWV geared hub cross-section.
